name: GLADSTONE INVESTMENT CORPORATION\DE
summary: Gladstone Investment Corporation (GAIN) is a business development company (BDC) incorporated in Delaware that operates as a regulated investment company (RIC). It focuses on investing in businesses, with an investment adviser named Gladstone Management Corporation. The company provides capital to portfolio companies and manages a portfolio of investments, financing activities through borrowed money and other capital sources.
